title: Kitty Totem of Undying
description: Changes the totem of undying to a silly cat. You can also wear it as a mask if you put it on your head.
body:
# Prewiev of some in-game visuals
IMPORTANT! This totem is fully animated, below are only screenshots, not video.

## Features:
- Animated totem of undying
- Custom totem pop/use sound
- Totem is wearable on player's head as a "mask"

### How to equip it on your head:
1. Using a Plugin/Mod: If your server supports custom equipment, equip it through your plugin or mod interface.
2. Using a Command: Execute the following in-game command to place the Totem on your head:
```
/item replace entity @p armor.head with minecraft:totem_of_undying
```
## Screenshots:
![totem_1](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/w6x0f18roi6v60pfzg6f3/totem_1.png?rlkey=7n655vccjw4yv4ic22nlr6dt7&st=dqqv52rb&raw=1)
![totem_2](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/i93kek1fqcmgh8xqpneo1/totem_2.png?rlkey=mufp9e650wxxlymefa9obavil&st=eizeyk8s&raw=1)
![totem_3](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/jze3v1qyonp8phz2umk3k/totem_3.png?rlkey=fphuceu66nviaefbzdrtpg1ww&st=i39xtkvi&raw=1)
